muxt generate --use-receiver-type=Server
muxt check

exec go test -race -count=1

-- template.gohtml --
{{- define "GET /endpoint Endpoint(execute)" -}}<p>{{- .Result -}}</p>{{- end -}}
-- go.mod --
module server

go 1.22
-- server.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
	"sync"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var templatesFS embed.FS

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(templatesFS, "*"))

type Server struct {
	mu    sync.Mutex
	value int
}

// Endpoint renders the template inside the critical section so the template
// reads s.value while the lock is held.
func (s *Server) Endpoint(execute func(int) error) error {
	s.mu.Lock()
	defer s.mu.Unlock()
	s.value++
	return execute(s.value)
}
-- server_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"sync"
	"testing"
)

func TestEndpoint(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, &Server{})

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/endpoint", nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
		t.Fatalf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
	}
	if got := rec.Body.String(); !strings.Contains(got, "<p>1</p>") {
		t.Fatalf("body = %q, want it to contain <p>1</p>", got)
	}
}

func TestEndpoint_concurrent(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()
	TemplateRoutes(mux, &Server{})

	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	for i := 0; i < 50; i++ {
		wg.Add(1)
		go func() {
			defer wg.Done()
			req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/endpoint", nil)
			rec := httptest.NewRecorder()
			mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)
			if rec.Code != http.StatusOK {
				t.Errorf("status = %d, want %d", rec.Code, http.StatusOK)
			}
		}()
	}
	wg.Wait()
}
